sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْبَرْمَجَةُ مَهَارَةً مُفِيدَةً جِدًّا فِي الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje se smatra veoma korisnom vještinom u modernom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is considered a very useful skill in the modern era.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الطُّلَّابُ كَيْفِيَّةَ كِتَابَةِ الْأَكْوَادِ لِإِنْشَاءِ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ وَالْمَوَاقِعِ.
sentences.translation: Studenti uče kako pisati kodove za kreiranje aplikacija i web stranica.
sentences.translationEn: Students learn how to write code to create apps and websites.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الْبَرْمَجَةُ عَلَى تَنْمِيَةِ التَّفْكِيرِ الْمَنْطِقِيِّ وَحَلِّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ الصَّعْبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje pomaže u razvoju logičkog razmišljanja i rješavanju teških problema.
sentences.translationEn: Programming helps develop logical thinking and solve difficult problems.
